spec.name: Deep Trail
spec.description: Beyond the trail junction, the Darkwood becomes perceptibly older and darker. The trees here are larger — oaks of a size that suggests centuries of growth — and their canopy is dense enough that the floor beneath has been cleared of undergrowth by shade, leaving bare earth and a deep carpet of dead leaves. Sound is absorbed differently here: footsteps muffle, voices flatten. The trail continues east, a rocky ridge rises to the north, and a rougher track branches northwest into older, wilder forest.
